revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:勅願寺]][[zh:敕願寺]]


'''Chokuganji''' (勅願寺) are temples established upon the request of the reigning {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} or {{ill|Daijō Tennō|en|Daijō Tennō|qid=Q14303973|lt=Jōkō|1=Daijō Tennō}} to pray for national peace, protection, and imperial prosperity. These temples belong to a specific {{ill|Rank of temples|ja|寺格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rank of temples|1=temple rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11457930}} within Japanese Buddhism.

In practice, many temples became Chokuganji after their establishment, obtaining the designation through {{ill|Royal_charter|en|Royal_charter|qid=Q1422253|lt=royal charter|1=Royal charter}}. Temples that became Chokuganji were often granted {{ill|Jisha-ryō|en|Jisha-ryō|qid=Q11458058|lt=temple estate|1=Jisha-ryō}}, and from the {{ill|Sengoku period|en|Sengoku period|qid=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku period}}, some temples actively sought imperial recognition to gain this status.

The designation of Chokuganji continued until the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}, when it was abolished under the {{ill|Shinbutsu bunri|lt=Shinbutsu bunri|lt=Separation of Shinto and Buddhism|ja|神仏分離令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/separation of Shinto and Buddhism|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神仏分離}}.

__TOC__

== Major Chokuganji ==
* {{ill|Zuigan-ji|en|Zuigan-ji|qid=Q3140498|lt=Matsushima Seiryu-san Zuigan-ji|1=Zuigan-ji}} (Rinzai Sect, {{ill|Matsushima, Miyagi|en|Matsushima, Miyagi|qid=Q1349082|lt=Matsushima, Miyagi|1=Matsushima, Miyagi}}, Miyagi Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Junna|en|Emperor Junna|qid=Q374136|lt=Emperor Junna|1=Emperor Junna}}
* {{ill|Rengebuji|en|Rengebuji|qid=Q11621751|lt=Kohiei-san Rengebō-ji|1=Rengebuji}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Sado, Niigata|en|Sado, Niigata|qid=Q499047|lt=Sado, Niigata|1=Sado, Niigata}}, Niigata Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Saga|en|Emperor Saga|qid=Q316654|lt=Emperor Saga|1=Emperor Saga}}
* {{ill|Daishōji|ja|大聖寺|lt=Sanmori Kōzan Chōkōō-in Daishōmyōōji|lt_ja=三守皇山 長光王院 大聖明王寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōji|1=Daishōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1157664}} (Shingon Sect Daigo School, {{ill|Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|en|Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|qid=Q1131437|lt=Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|1=Minamikoma District, Yamanashi}}, Yamanashi Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Takakura|en|Emperor Takakura|qid=Q357261|lt=Emperor Takakura|1=Emperor Takakura}}
* {{ill|Shōmyō-ji (Hino Town)|ja|正明寺 (日野町)|lt=Hōrin-san Shōmyō-ji|lt_ja=法輪山 正明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmyō-ji (Hino Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ōbaku Sect, {{ill|Hino, Shiga|ja|日野町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino, Shiga|1=Hinomachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11086884}}, Shiga Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|en|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|qid=Q320229|lt=Emperor Go-Mizunoo|1=Emperor Go-Mizunoo}}
* {{ill|Zenkō-ji|en|Zenkō-ji|qid=Q189640|lt=Jōgaku-san Zenkō-ji|1=Zenkō-ji}} (Non-sectarian, {{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano City, Nagano|1=Nagano (city)}}, Nagano Prefecture) - {{ill|Empress Saimei|ja|皇極天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Saimei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 斉明天皇|1=Empress Kōgyoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q235296}}
* {{ill|Shinraku-ji (Nagano Prefecture)|ja|真楽寺 (長野県御代田町)|lt=Asamayama Shinraku-ji|lt_ja=浅間山 真楽寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinraku-ji (Nagano Prefecture)|1=Shinraku-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22119082}} (Shingon Chizan School, {{ill|Miyota, Nagano|en|Miyota, Nagano|qid=Q1204123|lt=Miyota, Nagano|1=Miyota, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|qid=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}}<ref>{{Cite book |author=Nagano Prefecture Saku City Board of Education |date=1978-11-15 |title=Kitasaku Legends Compilation |page=75 }}</ref>.
* {{ill|Anyō-ji (Saku City)|ja|安養寺 (佐久市)|lt=Hōrinzan Anyō-ji|lt_ja=宝林山 安養寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anyō-ji (Saku City)|1=An'yō-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20043045}} (Rinzai Sect Myōshin School, {{ill|Saku, Nagano|en|Saku, Nagano|qid=Q495821|lt=Saku City, Nagano|1=Saku, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Fukakusa|en|Emperor Go-Fukakusa|qid=Q349246|lt=Emperor Go-Fukakusa|1=Emperor Go-Fukakusa}}<ref>Saku City Historical Folklore Volume</ref>.
* {{ill|Kawasaki Daishi|en|Kawasaki Daishi|qid=Q1504465|lt=Kongō-san Heiken-ji|1=Kawasaki Daishi}} (Shingon Chizan School, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|qid=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki, Kanagawa|1=Kawasaki, Kanagawa}}, Kanagawa Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|qid=Q349284|lt=Emperor Toba|1=Emperor Toba}}
* {{ill|Rinzai-ji|en|Rinzai-ji|qid=Q11612559|lt=Dairyūzan Rinzai-ji|1=Rinzai-ji}} (Rinzai Sect Myōshin School, {{ill|Shizuoka (city)|en|Shizuoka (city)|qid=Q174691|lt=Shizuoka City, Shizuoka|1=Shizuoka (city)}}, Shizuoka Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|qid=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara|1=Emperor Go-Nara}}
* {{ill|Aburayama-ji|ja|油山寺|lt=Iōzan Yakuō-in Aburayama-ji|lt_ja=医王山 薬王院 油山寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aburayama-ji|1=Yusan-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11554346}} (Shingon Chizan School, {{ill|Fukuroi, Shizuoka|en|Fukuroi, Shizuoka|qid=Q821337|lt=Fukuroi, Shizuoka|1=Fukuroi, Shizuoka}}, Shizuoka Prefecture) - {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|qid=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken|1=Empress Kōken}}
* {{ill|Chōkyū-ji (Hikone City)|ja|長久寺 (彦根市)|lt=Fumonsan Chōkyū-ji|lt_ja=普門山 長久寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōkyū-ji (Hikone City)|1=Chōkyū-ji Temple (Hikone)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11651423}} (Shingon Buzan School, {{ill|Hikone, Shiga|en|Hikone, Shiga|qid=Q386635|lt=Hikone, Shiga|1=Hikone, Shiga}}, Shiga Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|qid=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}
* {{ill|Ishiyama-dera|en|Ishiyama-dera|qid=Q1082791|lt=Ishiyama-ji|1=Ishiyama-dera}} (Tōji Shingon Sect, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|qid=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu, Shiga|1=Ōtsu}}, Shiga Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Hōgon-ji|en|Hōgon-ji|qid=Q3080736|lt=Ganekizan Hōgon-ji|1=Hōgon-ji}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Nagahama, Shiga|en|Nagahama, Shiga|qid=Q844130|lt=Nagahama, Shiga|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, Shiga Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Chōjū-ji|en|Chōjū-ji|qid=Q17214594|lt=Aseizan Chōjū-ji|1=Chōjū-ji}} (Tendai Sect, {{ill|Konan, Shiga|en|Konan, Shiga|qid=Q857194|lt=Kōnan, Shiga|1=Konan, Shiga}}, Shiga Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Nanzen-ji|en|Nanzen-ji|qid=Q1089767|lt=Zuiryūzan Nanzen-ji|1=Nanzen-ji}} (Rinzai Sect, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, Sakyo Ward) - {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|en|Emperor Kameyama|qid=Q360972|lt=Emperor Kameyama|1=Emperor Kameyama}}
* {{ill|Kiyomizu-dera|en|Kiyomizu-dera|qid=Q221716|lt=Otowayama Kiyomizu-dera|1=Kiyomizu-dera}} (Originally Shingon Sect, later {{ill|East Asian Yogācāra|en|East Asian Yogācāra|qid=Q349849|lt=Hossō Sect|1=East Asian Yogācāra}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, Higashiyama Ward) - {{ill|Emperor Saga|en|Emperor Saga|qid=Q316654|lt=Emperor Saga|1=Emperor Saga}}
* {{ill|Ninna-ji|en|Ninna-ji|qid=Q1202871|lt=Ōuchiyama Ninna-ji|1=Ninna-ji}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, Ukyo Ward) - {{ill|Emperor Uda|en|Emperor Uda|qid=Q349267|lt=Emperor Uda|1=Emperor Uda}}
* {{ill|Daigo-ji|en|Daigo-ji|qid=Q1157535|lt=Miyukiyama Daigo-ji|1=Daigo-ji}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, Fushimi Ward) - {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|qid=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}}
* {{ill|Myōken-ji (Kyoto City)|ja|妙顕寺 (京都市)|lt=Gusokuzan Myōken-ji|lt_ja=具足山 妙顕寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-ji (Kyoto City)|1=Myoken-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11447077}} (Nichiren Sect, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, Kamigyo Ward) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}}
* {{ill|Myōshin-ji|en|Myōshin-ji|qid=Q376288|lt=Shōbōzan Myōshin-ji|1=Myōshin-ji}} (Rinzai Sect, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, Ukyo Ward) - {{ill|Emperor Hanazono|en|Emperor Hanazono|qid=Q440503|lt=Emperor Hanazono|1=Emperor Hanazono}}
* {{ill|Daitoku-ji|en|Daitoku-ji|qid=Q901256|lt=Ryūhōzan Daitoku-ji|1=Daitoku-ji}} (Rinzai Sect, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, Kita Ward) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}}
* {{ill|Shinnyo-ji|ja|神峯山寺|lt=Konponzan Shinnyo-ji|lt_ja=根本山 神峯山寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinnyo-ji|1=Kabusan-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11589589}} (Tendai Sect, {{ill|Takatsuki|en|Takatsuki|qid=Q335423|lt=Takatsuki, Osaka|1=Takatsuki}}, Osaka Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|qid=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin|1=Emperor Kōnin}}
* {{ill|Jigen-in|ja|慈眼院|lt=Daihizan Jigen-in|lt_ja=大悲山 慈眼院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jigen-in|1=Jigen-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11495035}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Izumisano|en|Izumisano|qid=Q852018|lt=Izumisano, Osaka|1=Izumisano}}, Osaka Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}}, {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Rinshō-ji (Sennan City)|ja|林昌寺 (泉南市)|lt=Tsutsujiyama Rinshō-ji|lt_ja=躑躅山 林昌寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinshō-ji (Sennan City)|1=Rinshō-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11533079}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Sennan, Osaka|en|Sennan, Osaka|qid=Q838809|lt=Sennan, Osaka|1=Sennan, Osaka}}, Osaka Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Yakushi-ji|en|Yakushi-ji|qid=Q945913|lt=Yakushi-ji|1=Yakushi-ji}} (Hossō Sect, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City, Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}}
* {{ill|Akishino-dera|en|Akishino-dera|qid=Q4301475|lt=Akishino-dera|1=Akishino-dera}} (Independent, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City, Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|qid=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin|1=Emperor Kōnin}}
* {{ill|Tōdai-ji|en|Tōdai-ji|qid=Q460367|lt=Tōdai-ji|1=Tōdai-ji}} (Kegon Sect, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City, Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Obitoke-dera|ja|帯解寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Obitoke-dera|1=Obitoke-dera Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11481210}} (Kegon Sect, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City, Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Montoku|en|Emperor Montoku|qid=Q357225|lt=Emperor Montoku|1=Emperor Montoku}}
* {{ill|Anjō-ji|ja|安生寺|lt=Jinkōzan Anjō-ji|lt_ja=神光山 安生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anjō-ji|1=Anjō-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q85560585}} (Kōyasan Shingon Sect, {{ill|Gojō, Nara|en|Gojō, Nara|qid=Q602571|lt=Gojō, Nara|1=Gojō, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Saidai-ji|en|Saidai-ji|qid=Q1203935|lt=Saidai-ji|1=Saidai-ji}} (Shingon Ritsu Sect, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City, Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|称徳天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Shōtoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Empress Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q232955}}
* {{ill|Enjō-ji|en|Enjō-ji|qid=Q1088493|lt=Ninjugazan Enjō-ji|1=Enjō-ji}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City, Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}, {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|qid=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken|1=Empress Kōken}}
* {{ill|Ryōsen-ji (Nara)|en|Ryōsen-ji (Nara)|qid=Q1089221|lt=Hanatakayama Ryōzen-ji|1=Ryōsen-ji (Nara)}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City, Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Kume-dera|ja|久米寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume-dera|1=Kume-dera Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11369593}} (Shingon Ōmuro Sect, {{ill|Kashihara, Nara|en|Kashihara, Nara|qid=Q496319|lt=Kashihara, Nara|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|qid=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}}
* {{ill|Nyoi-rin-ji (Yoshino)|ja|如意輪寺|lt=Tōnomiyama Nyoi-rin-ji|lt_ja=塔尾山 如意輪寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoi-rin-ji (Yoshino)|1=Nyoirin-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17213767}} (Jōdo Sect, {{ill|Yoshino District, Nara|en|Yoshino District, Nara|qid=Q1154558|lt=Yoshino District, Nara|1=Yoshino District, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}}
* {{ill|Taisan-ji (Kobe)|en|Taisan-ji (Kobe)|qid=Q3514065|lt=Sanshinzan Taisan-ji|1=Taisan-ji (Kobe)}} (Tendai Sect, {{ill|Kobe|en|Kobe|qid=Q48320|lt=Kobe, Hyōgo|1=Kobe}}, Hyōgo Prefecture) - {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|qid=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}
* {{ill|Nyoi-ji (Kobe City)|ja|如意寺 (神戸市)|lt=Hikinzan Nyoi-ji|lt_ja=比金山 如意寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoi-ji (Kobe City)|1=Nyoi-ji Temple, Kobe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11446703}} (Tendai Sect, {{ill|Kobe|en|Kobe|qid=Q48320|lt=Kobe, Hyōgo|1=Kobe}}, Hyōgo Prefecture) - {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|qid=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}}
* {{ill|Sagami-ji|en|Sagami-ji|qid=Q3137229|lt=Senshōzan Sakami-ji|1=Sagami-ji}} (Shingon Sect, {{ill|Kasai, Hyōgo|en|Kasai, Hyōgo|qid=Q851155|lt=Kasai, Hyōgo|1=Kasai, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}
* {{ill|Kōgen-ji (Tanba City)|ja|高源寺_(丹波市)|lt=Zuigan-san Kōgen-ji|lt_ja=瑞巌山 高源寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgen-ji (Tanba City)|1=Kogen-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11671868}} (Rinzai Sect, [[:en:Tanba, Hyōgo|Tanba, Hyōgo]], Hyōgo Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|en|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|qid=Q349452|lt=Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|1=Emperor Go-Kashiwabara}}
* {{ill|Entsū-ji (Tanba City)|ja|円通寺_(丹波市)|lt=Eikozan Entsū-ji|lt_ja=永谷山 円通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entsū-ji (Tanba City)|1=Entsu-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394879}} (Sōtō Sect, [[:en:Tanba, Hyōgo|Tanba, Hyōgo]], Hyōgo Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Go-En'yū|en|Emperor Go-En'yū|qid=Q471799|lt=Emperor Go-En'yū|1=Emperor Go-En'yū}}
* {{ill|Kōzan-ji (Wakayama Prefecture)|ja|興山寺 (廃寺)|lt=Kōzan-ji|lt_ja=興山寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzan-ji (Wakayama Prefecture)|1=Kōzan-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55525916}} (Defunct, Shingon Sect, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|en|Ito District, Wakayama|qid=Q1131309|lt=Ito District, Wakayama|1=Ito District, Wakayama}}, Wakayama Prefecture) - {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|en|Emperor Go-Yōzei|qid=Q349440|lt=Emperor Go-Yōzei|1=Emperor Go-Yōzei}}
